description: During a broadcast, an agent needs to display a sponsored graphic (e.g., 'The Halftime Show, brought to you by...') at the correct time.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the broadcast schedule, which indicates when sponsored graphics should be shown.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent knows the exact time to display the halftime show graphic.

nodes.task_description: At the scheduled time, activate the appropriate sponsored graphic in the broadcast graphics system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully displays the correct graphic on air.

nodes.task_description: Log the display of the graphic for sponsorship fulfillment reporting.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a log entry confirming the ad was shown.
